title: Enhanced Weather
description: Revamps Minecraft's Weather by adding localized weather systems that move over time.
body: # Enhanced Weather **Notice: This project is discontinued, however, I am currently working on a new weather mod to replace it: Deluge. Stay tuned for it's eventual release!** This mod revamps Minecraft's Weather by adding localized weather effects and a volumetric cloud system. Some features include: - **Moving Volumetric Clouds** - **Wind** - **Localized Rain, Snow, Thunderstorms, and Hail** - **Rainbows!!!** - **Tornadoes** (WIP) - **Doppler Radar to track wind and storms** **NOTICE** Version 1.1 is a revamped version of Enhanced Weather, which differs from the 1.0 version, if you want the older version, then download 1.0 instead of 1.1. **I WILL NOT BE PROVIDING ANY SUPPORT FOR VERSION 1.0, ANY ISSUES OPENED RELATING TO IT WILL BE CLOSED IMMEDIATELY**
